zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Masters II於1417年出生在英國英格蘭肯特維也斯波洛時，他的父親Thomas Masters I22歲，母親Joanne Webb22歲。他於1435年之前與Denyse在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年6月在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Masters II于1417年出生在英国英格兰肯特維也斯波洛时，他的父亲Thomas Masters I22岁，母亲Joanne Webb22岁。他于1435年之前与Denyse在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年6月在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特阿福德聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Masters
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational and occupational name from Middle English (atte) maisteres ‘(at the) master's (house)’, a name for someone who lived or worked there, normally a servant. Compare Master and Masterman , and for the type compare Maidens , Monks , Parsons .
variant of Master , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Master
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Amar, Dhimant, Pravin, Amit, Aruna, Bhanu, Gaurang, Gopal, Haren, Jagu, Jayesh, Kalpesh.

English: occupational name from Middle English maister ‘master’ (Old French maistre). The word had a wide range of applications, and the reference in surnames may be to a schoolmaster, to the master of a farm or house, to the master of an apprentice, or to a ship's captain. In Scotland the eldest sons of barons and the uncles of lords were called Masters, but this is not primarily a Scottish surname.
German: dialect form of   Meister   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Maidens
meanings: occupational or habitational name from Middle English (atte) maydenes ‘(at the) maiden's or maidens' (house)’, a name for someone who lived or worked at such a house. Compare Masters and Parsons .
post-medieval variant of Maiden , with excrescent -s.

variants.name: Marsters
meanings: English: variant of Masters . Marsters is the predominant surname on Palmerston Island, Cook Islands, South Pacific, deriving from a settler and owner reputedly born in Leicestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Masters II was born in 1417, in Willesborough, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Masters I, was 22 and his mother, Joanne Webb, was 22. He married Denyse before 1435, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in June 1481, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Denyse avant 1435, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Masters II(이)가 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 윌레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Masters I(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne Webb(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1435년 이전 우럽에서 Denyse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 6월 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Masters II nasceu em 1417, em Willesborough, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Masters I, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joanne Webb, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Denyse antes 1435, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em junho de 1481, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary The Virgin's Church, Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Masters II родился в 1417 г. в местности уиллесбороую, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Masters I было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joanne Webb, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Denyse перед 1435 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер июнь 1481 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Denyse antes de 1435, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en junio de 1481, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary The Virgin's Church, Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
